common.ctaBody: [ES] Share your situation and our team will follow up with the right next step.

spanish.title: Ayuda para conducir en Florida, en español
spanish.subtitle: Recibe explicaciones en español sobre la preparación del permiso, las rutas para conductores, la educación por multas y el proceso de manejo en Florida.
spanish.faqHeading: Preguntas sobre la ayuda en español
spanish.ctaHeading: Recibe apoyo para conducir en español
spanish.ctaBody: Cuéntanos tu situación y te ayudamos a entender el siguiente paso en español.

permit.title: [ES] Prepare for the Florida permit exam with confidence
permit.subtitle: [ES] Practice questions, study tools, and clear explanations designed to help Florida drivers prepare for the knowledge exam in English or Spanish.
permit.ctaHeading: [ES] Get help preparing for the permit process
permit.ctaBody: [ES] Tell us what you need help with and our team will follow up.

ticket.title: [ES] Got a traffic ticket? Understand your options first.
ticket.subtitle: [ES] Florida Top 1 Driving School is building structured ticket education pathways to help drivers understand traffic-school related options and next steps.
ticket.ctaBody: [ES] Tell us what happened and our team will help you understand the next step.

reinstatement.title: [ES] Suspended license? Let's map your next steps.
reinstatement.subtitle: [ES] Suspension situations are time-sensitive. We explain the Advanced Driver Improvement (ADI) path where it applies and general first steps. Your status is determined by the state and any court orders — this is guidance, not legal advice, and no outcome is guaranteed.

mature.title: [ES] A safety refresher built for drivers 55 and older
mature.subtitle: [ES] Take an approved Mature Driver course online and get guidance on submitting completion to your insurer. Any premium discount is determined solely by your insurance company — we can't promise one.

newfl.title: [ES] New to Florida? Build your licensing checklist.
newfl.subtitle: [ES] Whether you're moving from another state or another country, we help you understand the Florida process, the documents commonly needed, and the right prep — in English and Spanish. General guidance only; always confirm current requirements with official sources.
